meaning: n.满箱,满满一箱的量,许多
examples: First, they squirt a trunkful of cool water over their bodies.
Wear, dearest? I thought a trunkful of things had come from Paris last week.
As we sit and watch, a desert elephant storms up, blasting itself with a trunkful of dust to keep cool.
Others are happy to car camp, setting up tents within reach of a trunkful of gear and supplies.
